description: Initial external CadQuery benchmark index for generalization-oriented coverage.

entries.prompt: Create a 40x20x10 mm plate and add 2 mm fillets to all outer edges.
Model an L-bracket with a centered through-slot and consistent wall thickness.
Create a shelled block with a shallow top-face recess and a reference hole pattern.
Create an embossed braille nameplate on a rectangular base, with multiple lines of Unicode braille dots laid out at fixed spacing.
Model a rounded electronics enclosure with a base, lid lip, filleted outer edges, and four screw-post bosses for fasteners.
Build a cylindrical core with a parametric helical thread formed from ruled surfaces around the bore.
Create a shelled cube and chamfer only the interior top edges using logical selector expressions.
Create an arc-shaped mount block by sweeping a rectangular profile along a radius arc and add counterbored mounting holes.
Model a two-part latch mount with an offset baseplate and counterplate, chamfers, grooves, and aligned through-holes.
Generate a rugged Gridfinity storage box with lid, optional handles, clasps, hinges, and separate accessory parts.
Create a rectangular casting mold with a revolved internal cavity, corner mounting holes, and transverse fill or vent holes.
Model a compact enclosure with a shelled body, a lip-fit cover, and countersunk button or fastener holes on the top face.
Create a multi-wing support bracket with a bridge, selector-driven cutouts, and a mix of drilled and counterbored mounting holes.
Model a swept rod clip with a curved hook section, a filleted base, and drilled plus countersunk mounting holes.
Create a lofted spacer block with an optional recessed top and underside countersunk mounting holes.
Model an angled wall mount built from a lofted base and drill face-normal countersunk mounting holes through the body.
Create a Gridfinity baseplate with patterned underside cuts and corner countersunk mounting tabs.
Model a Gridfinity box with a shell, bottom mounting holes, internal dividers, interior scoops, and label flanges.
